# Love Loom

Love Loom is a curated fashion and handcrafted textile store in Banjara Hills, Hyderabad, India.
Tagline: Woven with love, made to last.
Canonical website: https://theloveloom.in

## What Love Loom offers

- Authentic-wear-inspired clothing, contemporary Indian silhouettes, dresses, shirts, denim, footwear, and accessories.
- Product details including materials, care, sizing, colours, availability, and INR prices.
- Personal ordering and product enquiries through WhatsApp.
- In-store previews and pop-up events in Hyderabad.
- Editorial guidance about Indian textiles, handloom authenticity, styling, fashion trends, and garment care.

## Important pages

- Home: https://theloveloom.in/
- Products: https://theloveloom.in/products
- Categories: https://theloveloom.in/categories
- Brands: https://theloveloom.in/brands
- Journal: https://theloveloom.in/journal
- About: https://theloveloom.in/about
- Contact: https://theloveloom.in/contact

## Store

Address: Unit 1, 3rd Floor, Road No. 10, Gouri Shankar Nagar Colony, Banjara Hills, Hyderabad, Telangana 500034
Phone and WhatsApp: +91 90322 88446
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/loveloom_hyderabad

Product availability, event dates, and prices should be confirmed on the relevant page or directly with Love Loom.
